zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Bermingham於大約1124年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 奧法利時，他的父親Piers Birmingham21歲，母親Catherine de Kingsley26歲。他於1150年之前與Catherine de Valognes Valensis在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1197年在英國瓦維其可爾比米加姆享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Bermingham于大约1124年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 奧法利时，他的父亲Piers Birmingham21岁，母亲Catherine de Kingsley26岁。他于1150年之前与Catherine de Valognes Valensis在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1197年在英国瓦維其可爾比米加姆享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bermingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Sinead.
Irish (of English origin): variant of   Birmingham  . This form of the surname is found mainly in Ireland.

History: The Bermingham family take their surname from lands held at what is now a great city in the West Midlands of England, but it was brought to Ireland as early as the 12th century. The Norman baron Robert de Bermyngeham was a follower of Strongbow (see Clare ); his name is found on a number of Irish charters between 1175 and 1179. The family was also known as Mac Fheorais (see Corish ) in Ireland, named for Piers (Gaelic Feoras) de Bermyngeham, the father of Robert.

variants.name: Birmingham
meanings: English: habitational name from Birmingham in the West Midlands. In Domesday Book the name is already found as Bermingeham, but it seems likely that it was originally Beornmundingahām ‘homestead (Old English hām) of the people of (-inga-) Beornmund’, a personal name composed of the elements beorn ‘young man, warrior’ + mund ‘protection’. This surname is established in Ireland (see Bermingham ).

variants.name: Corish
meanings: shortened form of Mac Fheorais ‘son of Piers’. The name was borne by a Connacht family descended from Piers de Bermingham, second lord of Athenry in Galway (died c. 1309). Compare Bermingham .
shortened form of Mac Muirghis ‘son of Maurice’, a personal name introduced to Ireland by the Normans. Compare Morrissey .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.description: Arrival of Normans at Baginbun in Co. Wexford thus started 800 year struggle between English and Irish.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Bermingham was born about 1124, in County Offaly, Ireland, his father, Piers Birmingham, was 21 and his mother, Catherine de Kingsley, was 26. He married Catherine de Valognes Valensis before 1150, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1197, in Birmingham, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 74.

fr.Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United King: Carew, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Bermingham est né environ 1124, à County Offaly, Irlande, son père, Piers Birmingham, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Catherine de Kingsley, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Catherine de Valognes Valensis avant 1150, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1197, à Birmingham, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Bermingham um 1124 in County Offaly, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Piers Birmingham 21 und seine Mutter Catherine de Kingsley 26. Er hat vor 1150 in Irland Catherine de Valognes Valensis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1197 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Birmingham, Warwickshire, England.

Lui sposato Catherine de Valognes Valensis prima del 1150, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1197, nel Birmingham, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Berminghamが約1124年にアイルランドコウントイ オファリーで生まれた時，父Piers Birminghamは21歳，母Catherine de Kingsleyは26歳であった。1150年以前にアイルランドでCatherine de Valognes Valensisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1197年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアバーミンガムで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Bermingham(이)가 대략 1124년 아일랜드 카운티 파리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Piers Birmingham(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine de Kingsley(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1150년 이전 아일랜드에서 Catherine de Valognes Valensis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1197년 영국 워윅실르 비밍함에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Catherine de Valognes Valensis antes 1150, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1197, em Birmingham, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Bermingham родился около 1124 г. в местности коунти оффали, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Piers Birmingham было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Catherine de Kingsley, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine de Valognes Valensis перед 1150 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1197 г. в местности бирмингхам, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Bermingham nació aproximadamente 1124, en County Offaly, Irlanda, su papá, Piers Birmingham, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Catherine de Kingsley, tenía 26 años.
